title: Ko Teng Thum Ni Suahna Panin

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ko teng thum ni suahna panin, mual le guam gamlapi kanin;
Letsong puakin kong pai uh hi, Hih
aksipi zui-in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw, lamdang mahmah zan aksi,
Kumpi’ vang a tang
aksi,
Hong masuan in lam hong hilh in,
Khuavak thak phual hong tun in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kumpi
khat suakzo ngel hi a, A Kumpi lukhu dingin ah;
Ei tung hong mang den tahen, ci’n kong puak uh,
kham manpha.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ke’n zong pak namtui kong keng hi, Pasian tawh kinaina lim
hi;
Thungetna le phatna biakna, van-a Pasian puak ni.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kei aa pawh pak namtui kha hi,
lungkhamna le thuakna limi hi;
Dah in kapin, sisan luangin, han vot sung lum ding
hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Min thanna tawh a kidim Pa, Kumpi, Pasian hong kipia Pa;
Hallelujah, Hallelujah,
lei le van in phatta.
